query:
SELECT pjl.scene_id, pjl.status, COUNT(*) as count
FROM provider_job_logs pjl
WHERE pjl.scene_id IN (
  SELECT id FROM music_video_scenes 
  WHERE job_id = (SELECT MAX(job_id) FROM music_video_scenes WHERE status = 'failed')
  AND status = 'failed'
  LIMIT 10
)
GROUP BY pjl.scene_id, pjl.status
ORDER BY pjl.scene_id, pjl.status;
